title: marlea alpina
intro: Marlea alpina, also known as Alpine Marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include being used as a natural expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion, as well as having anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Marlea alpina include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
